mapper.select: select r.living_theme,r.living_description,date_format(r.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as start_time,r.living_time ,u.user_name,u.headimgurl,r.living_num,r.living_img,r.living_status from lkt_living_user_like l left join lkt_living_room r on r.id = l.living_id left join lkt_user u on u.user_id=r.user_id where l.user_id=#{user_id} and l.recycle=0 order by l.id desc;
